title: Iran’s Defenses Have Been Struck, but They Can Still Fire Missiles and Drones
summary_full: Iran has sent waves of missiles and drones at Israel and Gulf states in recent weeks and shot down an American fighter jet on Friday.
summary_public: Iran has sent waves of missiles and drones at Israel and Gulf states in recent weeks and shot down an American fighter jet on Friday.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran has sent waves of missiles and drones at Israel
